title: tunica illyrica var. levis
intro: Tunica illyrica var. levis, also known as Illyrian tunica or wild valerian, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, which are attributed to the presence of valepotriates and isovalerenic acid. The health benefits of Tunica illyrica var. levis include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and relief from symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and calmness.
